member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Constants
member.summary: Hardcoded Protean GSP configuration (E-Invoice / E-Waybill). Mirrors Tyresoles.Live backend Tyresoles.One.Data.Services.Protean.Constants.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Protean.Constants.Environment
member.summary: Use Sandbox for test endpoints; Production for live NIC IRP. Can be set via env PROTEAN_SANDBOX=true or Protean__Sandbox=true.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.IProteanEncryptor
member.summary: All cryptographic operations required by the Protean GSP API.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.IProteanEncryptor.GenerateSecureKey
member.summary: Generate a random 32-byte AES app key.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.IProteanEncryptor.EncryptRsa(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Encrypt using the public key. Legacy implementation used RSACryptoServiceProvider with fOAEP: false.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.IProteanEncryptor.EncryptAes(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: AES-256-ECB encrypt bytes using bytes. Returns base-64 ciphertext string (as expected by the Protean API).

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.IProteanEncryptor.DecryptAes(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: AES-256-ECB decrypt using bytes. Returns decrypted UTF-8 string.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.IProteanEncryptor.DecryptAesBytes(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: AES-256-ECB decrypt returning raw bytes (for cases where the inner payload is JSON).

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.IProteanEncryptor.SignData(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: RSA-SHA256 sign using the ASP private key XML. Returns base-64 signature.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.IProteanEncryptor.Base64Decode(System.String)
member.summary: Base-64 decode helper (convenience).

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.ProteanEncryptor
member.summary: Default implementation – pure BCL, no external crypto libs. Registered as singleton; all methods are thread-safe.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.ProteanEncryptor.EncryptRsa(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Encrypt using the public key. Legacy implementation used RSACryptoServiceProvider with fOAEP: false.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Http.IProteanHttpClient
member.summary: Typed HTTP client for the Protean EInvoice (IRP) API.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Http.IProteanEWbHttpClient
member.summary: Typed HTTP client for the Protean EWaybill API.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Http.LongToStringConverter
member.summary: A System.Text.Json converter that allows reading JSON number values as strings. Useful for Protean APIs that sometimes return numeric data for string properties.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Http.ProteanHttpClientBase
member.summary: Shared async HTTP helper. Handles: • Building query-strings for GET • Attaching headers • JSON serialise / deserialise (System.Text.Json) • Structured logging of round-trip

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Http.EInvoiceUrls
member.summary: Protean IRP (EInvoice v1.04) URL constants.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Http.EWaybillUrls
member.summary: Protean EWaybill (v1.03) URL constants.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Http.EWaybillActions
member.summary: EWaybill action codes.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EInvoice.EInvoiceRequest
member.summary: Top-level wrapper sent by callers. The inner is serialised + AES-encrypted before being sent to the IRP.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EInvoice.EInvoiceRequest.Request
member.summary: EInvoice payload per GST schema v1.1.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EInvoice.EInvoiceRequest.Document
member.summary: Optional: document reference for logging (type + number).

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EInvoice.EInvoiceRequest.Irn
member.summary: Optional: fetch by existing IRN instead of generating new one.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EInvoice.EInvoiceResult
member.summary: Decrypted EInvoice IRN response from IRP.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EWaybill.EWaybillRequest
member.summary: Caller-facing wrapper for all EWaybill operations.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EWaybill.EWaybillRequest.Generate
member.summary: Generate request payload (set for Generate operations).

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EWaybill.EWaybillRequest.Cancel
member.summary: Cancel request (set for Cancel operations).

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EWaybill.EWaybillRequest.PartB
member.summary: PartB/vehicle update request.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EWaybill.EWaybillRequest.Consolidate
member.summary: Consolidate trip-sheet request.

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EWaybill.EWaybillRequest.ByDoc
member.summary: Lookup by document (type + number).

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Models.Gstin.GstinDetails
member.summary: GSTIN details returned from the IRP master data API.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.ProteanException
member.summary: Base exception for all Protean GSP errors.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.DuplicateIrnException
member.summary: Thrown when the IRP returns error code 2150 (duplicate IRN). The caller can read to obtain the existing IRN details.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.DuplicateIrnInfo
member.summary: IRN detail returned inside error 2150.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.DuplicateIrnInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: IRN detail returned inside error 2150.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.EWaybillGenerateException
member.summary: Thrown when the EWaybill API returns validation error codes. The dictionary maps error code → human-readable message.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.ProteanServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering all Protean GSP services into the DI container. Configuration is read from (hardcoded); set for Sandbox vs Production.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.ProteanServiceCollectionExtensions.AddProtean(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Register Tyresoles.Protean services. Uses for config (no appsettings). To use sandbox, set Constants.Environment = ProteanEnvironment.Sandbox before or at startup.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.EInvoiceService
member.summary: EInvoice service implementation (IRP API v1.04 via Protean GSP). Async-first, no static state; session management delegated to .

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.EInvoiceService.#ctor(Tyresoles.Protean.Http.IProteanHttpClient,Tyresoles.Protean.Session.IProteanSessionService,Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.IProteanEncryptor,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Tyresoles.Protean.Services.EInvoiceService})
member.summary: EInvoice service implementation (IRP API v1.04 via Protean GSP). Async-first, no static state; session management delegated to .

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.EWaybillService
member.summary: EWaybill service implementation (Protean GSP API v1.03). Async-first, session-managed, no static state.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.EWaybillService.#ctor(Tyresoles.Protean.Http.IProteanEWbHttpClient,Tyresoles.Protean.Session.IProteanSessionService,Tyresoles.Protean.Encryption.IProteanEncryptor,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Tyresoles.Protean.Services.EWaybillService})
member.summary: EWaybill service implementation (Protean GSP API v1.03). Async-first, session-managed, no static state.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.EwbErrorMessages
member.summary: Static lookup for Protean EWaybill error codes → human-readable messages. Populated directly from the official error code list.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.IEInvoiceService
member.summary: High-level EInvoice service (IRP v1.04). All methods are fully async and cancellation-aware.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.IEInvoiceService.GenerateIrnAsync(Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EInvoice.EInvoiceRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generate a new IRN for the given invoice.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.IEInvoiceService.GetIrnAsync(Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EInvoice.EInvoiceRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieve an existing IRN by IRN hash.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.IEInvoiceService.GetIrnByDocumentAsync(Tyresoles.Protean.Models.EInvoice.EInvoiceRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieve an existing IRN by document type/number/date (last 2 days only).

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.IEInvoiceService.GetGstinAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch live GSTIN details from the IRP master.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.IEInvoiceService.SyncGstinAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Force-sync GSTIN details from the IRP master.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Services.IEWaybillService
member.summary: High-level EWaybill service (v1.03). All methods are fully async and cancellation-aware.

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Session.ProteanSession
member.summary: Cached Protean GSP session (per GSTIN).

member.name: P:Tyresoles.Protean.Session.ProteanSession.Sek
member.summary: Session Encryption Key (base-64 AES-256).

member.name: T:Tyresoles.Protean.Session.IProteanSessionService
member.summary: Manages Protean GSP sessions for both EInvoice and EWaybill APIs. Sessions are cached in-memory keyed by (gstin + apiKind). Thread-safe via IMemoryCache.

member.name: M:Tyresoles.Protean.Session.IProteanSessionService.InvalidateEInvoiceSession(System.String)
member.summary: Removes cached EInvoice session for the given GSTIN so the next request fetches a fresh session.
